name: Mc Means Bus Co Inc
inc_date: 1980 (year founded/incorporated per business directories; exact date not retrieved from PA DOS)
officers: Ernest W. McMeans (owner/operator 1980–2012, born 10/09/1948 in Dayton PA)
entity_status: unknown (likely inactive/dissolved given owner's reported exit in 2012; current operating status of bus operation unclear)
registry_source: PA Department of State business entity search (file.dos.pa.gov) — not directly accessible via WebFetch; secondary sources used
notes: No SAFER/FMCSA record found under MCMEANS, MC MEANS, MEANS BUS, or MC MEANS BUS searches — company may not hold a USDOT (small intrastate PA school bus contractor not required to register if exempt) or registered under a different name. Address 241 Pipeline Rd, Dayton PA 16222 (Armstrong County) confirmed via Manta/Birdeye/Yelp; phone (814) 257-8245. Operates as school bus contractor for Armstrong School District (Dayton Elementary, West Shamokin HS). Owner Ernest McMeans ran company 1980-2012 per obituary; current status unclear.

name: Safe-Way Bus Co
officers: Jane Stiles, Thomas Stiles (per STB acquisition-of-control filing)
registry_source: Wisconsin DFI (per Federal Register STB filing referencing WI corporation); STB Docket MCF 21148
notes: Legal name 'SAFE-WAY WISCONSIN INC' DBA 'SAFE-WAY BUS CO - WISC' — physical address (270 LAGRANDUER, SOMERSET, WI 54025) matches input exactly. AUTHORIZED FOR HIRE Passenger carrier. MCS-150 filed 03/17/2026 with 318,295 miles for 2025. Recent STB filing (May 2026) by Jane and Thomas Stiles acquiring control of Safe-Way Bus Co. and Safe-Way Wisconsin Inc. Note: a separate Wisconsin Rapids entity 'SAFE WAY BUS TRANSIT INC' (USDOT 833593, 70 power units, 60 drivers) is a different carrier and not this Somerset operation.
